title: Practice Menu Pure Media Tacit Browse Cards
goal: Expose standalone tacit items with tacit_type === 'media' as minimal native image/video browse cards on /practice/menu/:menuId using the already-fetched PracticeMenuBundle, without changing practice store/runtime/query boundaries or expanding into signed/private URL handling.
constraints: Keep src/lib/practice/menuView.ts bundle-only and do not import sessionView, React state helpers from other pages, Zustand, or Supabase

Keep src/lib/practice/queries.ts, src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/sessionView.ts, src/types/practice.ts, router, sim pages, and PracticeAdminPage unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Render pure media tacit items as a separate browse card section inside the expanded step-group UI; do not rewrite the existing non-media tacit preview contract into a mixed union list for this task
Limit media rendering to native image/video with directly usable URLs; defer signed/private URL handling, modal/gallery/custom player work, and cross-type browse-order unification
Keep CSS changes additive under browse-prefixed classes and reuse existing gameVariables.css tokens first; do not widen scope into legacy selector cleanup
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, display:none, admin/game cross-import, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure menu browse helper can derive stable standalone media-tacit preview cards from existing PracticeMenuBundle.tacit_items and tacit_media using media-type tacit items only, with deterministic per-item and per-media ordering

The helper preserves the current non-media tacit preview behavior for title/body/sensory/media-attached items and adds a separate per-step-group pure-media preview collection without importing React, Zustand, Supabase, or sessionView helpers

PracticeMenuPage keeps the existing menu details, step-group expand/collapse UI, non-media tacit preview, and safe start-session CTA, and adds standalone image/video browse cards for pure media tacit items within expanded groups

If a step group has only pure media tacit items, the page shows those cards instead of the current empty hint; if a pure media item has no usable linked media, the UI omits it cleanly without placeholder chrome
Queries, types, practiceStore, runtime, sessionView, PracticePage, sim routes/pages, and PracticeAdminPage remain behaviorally unchanged

npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/menuView.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
